name: Duskwatch Company
specialty: Known for their relentless pursuit and strategic dismantling of rogue factions within the Undercity, the Duskwatch Company has carved a niche as a formidable force in enforcing the Wardens of Ash's interests.

members.name: Tirion Nightshade
members.note: A tall, muscular man with a stern visage and piercing silver eyes, Tirion is rumored to have once been a captain in the city watch before joining the Wardens of Ash.

members.name: Aria Embersong
members.note: Aria, with her fiery red hair and ethereal green eyes, is feared for her uncanny ability to track and anticipate the movements of their targets.

members.name: Kragor Stonefist
members.note: Kragor, with his thick, scarred physique and intimidating presence, is a fierce combatant and serves as the enforcer of the group.

visual: Clad in black ash leather armor and hooded cloaks with the symbol of the Wardens of Ash emblazoned on their chests, the Duskwatch Company carries themselves with a steely determination that speaks volumes of their reputation.
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity: 'Cross them, and you'll pay dearly.' Few dare to challenge the Duskwatch Company, for they are swift and ruthless in their pursuit of justice.
